name: Cream Puff in a Pan
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Instant pudding mix - any flavor
recipeInstructions:
Bring water and margarine to a boil. Add flour all at once. Remove from heat. Beat in eggs, one at a time. Spread in greased 10x15-inch jelly roll pan. Bake in preheated 400 degree oven for 25 to 30 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Beat together pudding mix, milk and cream cheese. Spread over cooled cream puff crust. Spread with prepared topping. Just before serving drizzle with chocolate syrup. Leftovers must be refrigerated.
